payload.answer: Do not store the proposed card. A full 8000-word transcript is not durable memory as-is; only specific, stable, user-relevant facts should be considered separately if they meet durability criteria.
payload.reason: An entire transcript, even labeled as a conversation_summary, is not an appropriately durable memory item. It is likely overly broad, noisy, and may contain transient or sensitive details that should not be committed wholesale.
